prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document pertains to an internal process related to the CAC (Central Arbitration Committee) and does not specifically address legislation or policies applicable to Scotland. It primarily deals with procedures that may be relevant in England and potentially Wales, but Scotland has its own legal and arbitration framework.
